classes.reasoning: Document explicitly identifies itself as 'Clinical Study Protocol — AMENDMENT 2' in the title, includes protocol number BIORCE-ONC-2023-001, version history, amendment summary describing protocol changes to eligibility criteria, dose modifications, and assessments, and instructions for site implementation requiring Ethics Committee approval.

summary: This is Amendment 2 (version 2.1) of a clinical study protocol for trial BIORCE-ONC-2023-001, investigating BRC-471 (Lumitanib), an oral EGFR/HER2 dual inhibitor in oncology. The amendment updates dose modification procedures (addition of prophylactic ondansetron), expands eligibility criteria regarding prior HER2-targeted therapy, adds a ctDNA collection timepoint at C3D1, adds Netherlands as a new country with 3 sites, and updates the statistical analysis plan to include a HER2-amplified subgroup analysis.
references_to: Version 2.0 | 22 Aug 2023 | Amendment 1 — Updated CNS metastasis criteria
